steps.title: Match the singular noun
steps.content: The blank modifies important place, and place is singular. The word in the blank must therefore be a singular demonstrative that can refer back to the Okavango Delta.

steps.title: Reject plural modifiers
steps.content: Choice B refers to two things and cannot modify the singular noun place. Choice C is plural, so it does not agree with place. Choice D is also plural and creates the same number disagreement. The answer is A.
